name: bcms
description: A plugin that teaches Claude how to work with BCMS. It covers the @thebcms/client SDK, templates, entries, groups, widgets, media, functions and webhooks, permissions, security, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for agent-driven content work with scoped keys. 1.1: canonical skill symlinked into the plugin, optional bcms-mcp skill for MCP-focused flows, local examples under ai/scripts; see ai/CHANGELOG.md.
